title: Yaaro Yaar Aval Lyrics Arima Nambi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yaaro Yaar Aval
Singer(s): Runa Rizvi, Shabbir Kumar
Movie: Arima Nambi
Music: Sivamani

Saturn poovin vaasam kanden
oodha vanna Saturn poo
en oorukulle nuzhanthennai
mayakki vittaal.
idhayathai sila nodi niruthiye
marupadi iyaki vittaal.

are you ready
come on sing with me

yaa ro yaar aval
yaa ro yaar aval
yaa ro yaar aval
yaa ro yaar aval

kashmiri thena
mumbai pen maana
kolkata meena
delhi pen thaana
en thozhan ennai ketaane
illai enre naan sonnene
aiyo tamizh uraithaal
en nenjaiye parithaal

manathil vaalai vaalai erikiraal
... rasikiraal
azhagi yaaro yaar aval
azhagi yaaro yaar aval

araiyil thedinen
yaar undhan devathai
azhagin uchamai
yaar antha thaaragai

yaaro yaaro aval
yaaro yaaro aval
unadhu kannaal neeyum thedinaal
kedaikamaataal yeno kooradi
unakku yaaro yaar aval
enakku yaaro yaar aval

yaar pole saaya
un pole konjam
yen indha vetkam
kaanome nenjam

avalin per enna?
ennai yen ketkirai
avalin en enna?
ennai yen paarkiraai

yaaro yaaro aval
yaaro yaaro aval
vidaiyai arinthum ennai seendinaal
tamizhil ennai paada thoondinaal
muraithu ninraal yaar aval
manathai venraal yaar aval

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaaro Yaar Aval'?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, inviting listeners to join in the fun.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Arima Nambi'?

In the movie, this song is featured during a lively celebration scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who are the singers of 'Yaaro Yaar Aval'?

The song is sung by Runa Rizvi and Shabbir Kumar.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yaaro Yaar Aval' was composed by Sivamani.

When was 'Yaaro Yaar Aval' released?

The song was released on July 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro Yaar Aval, the upbeat tempo and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song is a perfect fit for party scenes in Arima Nambi, where it enhances the festive spirit among the characters. With its catchy melody and energetic vocals, it invites listeners to join in the fun and dance along. The collaboration between Runa Rizvi and Shabbir Kumar adds a unique charm, making it a memorable track for any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Yaar Aval from Arima Nambi is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With the dynamic vocals of Runa Rizvi and Shabbir Kumar, this track is sure to get you on your feet. The infectious beats crafted by Sivamani make it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: I saw the fragrance of the Saturn flower, if it makes you dizzy in my town. If the heart stops for a moment, it will shake again.
Who is she? Who is she?
Are you ready? Come on, sing with me.
Who is she? Who is she? Who is she? Who is she?
Kashmiri honey, Mumbai girl, Kolkata fish, Delhi girl. My friend doesn't ask me, I told him, oh! When I speak Tamil, my heart feels it.
Who? Who? Who? Who? Who is she?
In my mind, a beautiful girl is dancing... Who is she? Who is she?
I searched in the sky, who is your angel? Who is that star?
Who is she? Who is she? If you look with your eyes, you won't find her. Why do you say that? Who is she? Who is she?
Like who? Like you? Why does my heart feel this discomfort?
What is her name? Why do you ask me? What is she looking at me for?
Who is she? Who is she? Even if I know the end, if I sing in Tamil, who will come to my heart? Who is she? Who is she?
